figures.caption: Figure 1. BA-GSAC architecture. The environment provides full state to the guiding actor (blue, top) and partial observations to the control actor (orange, middle). GSAC distills the guiding actor’s knowledge to the control actor via a λ-weighted loss. Our contribution (red, below dashed line): an ensemble of forward models measures disagreement ut, which adaptively modulates λt so that guidance is strong when the agent is uncertain and weak when confident.
